name: notion-flow
description: Notion-style editing for Obsidian: drag-and-drop blocks, table editing, slash commands, floating toolbar with colors, cleaner WYSIWYG. English & 中文.

scripts.test: esbuild src/main.ts --bundle --alias:obsidian=./test/obsidian-stub.mjs --alias:@codemirror/view=./test/view-stub.mjs --alias:@codemirror/language=./test/language-stub.mjs --format=esm --outfile=test/bundle.mjs && for t in test/run*.mjs; do node $t || exit 1; done

author: Xin
